title: tiniaria convolvulus
intro: Tiniaria convolvulus, also known as Ipomoea convolvulus or Convolvulus arvensis, is a type of annual flowering plant that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been shown to aid in wound healing, reducing pain and swelling. Consuming Tiniaria convolvulus has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing blood pressure, improving digestion, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Tiniaria convolvulus can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused in oil to be used topically, with the dried leaves and flowers also being used in capsule form for internal use.
